title: Rose Gold Ribbon 3mm, 91M Double Faced Satin Ribbons for Gift Wrapping, Gift Ribbon for Crafting, DIY Sewing Projects, Floral Bouquet, Hair Bows, Birthday, Baby Shower and Wedding Cake Decoration
features: Double Faced Material: wrapping ribbons is made of premium double sided polyester fabric, the surface is smooth, both sides are full of luster. It is good for Gift Wrapping and DIY Crafts Proejcts

Rose Gold Ribbons: each roll is 91M(100 Yards) in length, 3mm in width. Each color is very bright. You can cut into any lenght to meet your needs and enough length for your daily gift packaging and DIY crafts needs

As Gift Wrap Ribbons: satin ribbon is suitable for many occasions, which can be applied for gift wrapping in wedding party, baby shower, birthday party, graduation, anniversary, Easter, Thanksgiving, Halloween, Christmas, Mother’s Day, Father’s Day, New Year, Bridal Shower, engagement, etc. As decorative ribbon, which can enrich the sense of festival ceremony and give you a warm atmosphere

Ribbon for Crafts: satin ribbon not only can be used for DIY crafts projects, such as bows making, scrapbooking, ribbon chandelier, ribbon wands, rose flowers, corsage, graduation leis, DIY hair accessories, handmade flowers crafts, but also decorating for favor boxes, wreaths, clothing, cakes, balloons, flower arrangement, bridal bouquet, souvenir, vase, embroidery, invitation cards, wedding cars, easter eggs, basket, Xmas trees, festival banners, etc
Warm Notes: please keep the ends of the ribbon to prevent loosening and threading when you are not using
description: Product Description 23m Fabric Ribbons Sewing Ribbon Gift 1. The ribbon is made of high quality single-sided polyester fabric, soft and luxurious. The surface is very smooth and one side is glossy. Ideal for DIY sewing craft projects. Each roll has a width of 3 / 8 in (10 mm) and a total length of 25 yards (23 M)3. Enough length for DIY craft projects Satin ribbon can be used not only for DIY craft projects, such as making bows, scrapbooking, roses, corsages, graduation garland, DIY hair accessories, but also for decorating gift boxes, garlands, clothes, cakes, balloons, floral arrangements, bridal bouquets, souvenirs, vases, embroidery, invitations, wedding cars, Easter eggs, baskets, Christmas trees, festival banners, etc Please keep the ends of the tape to prevent loosening and threading when you are not using it Gift Wrapping Tape Christmas Decorations Baby Shower Tape DIY Crafts Arc Making Flowers bouquet decoration
